'''Owen Delstar''' was a [[Coruscanti/Legends|native]] of the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="TAL" /> an [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]]<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> located in the [[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref> The Coruscanti served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Republic officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. This war, between the Republic and the resurgent forces of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], began in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], where the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorians]] made a three-pronged assault against the Republic in [[3963 BBY]]. In the aftermath of this assault, known by the Republic media as the "Onslaught," Delstar received a promotion to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. [[Gender/Legends|His]] promotion, reported in the [[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition|Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication of the Republic Navy, occurred alongside that of notable [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Saul Karath]] to [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]].<ref name="TAL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Owen Delstar was created by [[John Jackson Miller]], the author of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], and was mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', appended to [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]]. This [[in-universe]] news source is designed as "an official communique for the Republic providing news from the 'regular navy' point of view," inspired by the "Napoleonic-era Britain's Naval Chronicle."<ref name="DH Boards">{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?p=143036|thread=News from the world of KOTOR -- literally!|user=[[John Jackson Miller]]|date=2006-12-18}}</ref> Some of the promotions presented here are said to be confirmations of ones received on the battlefield, but it is not specified which these are or which are regular promotions.
